visual_description: A man in a suit and tie with earphones is seen in close-up, looking slightly downward. In a nighttime outdoor scene, several individuals in dark uniforms stand near a vehicle with headlights on, some appearing to be examining the area. One person in the foreground gestures with their hand while facing away from the camera.

The environment is acoustically reflective, with short, bright reverberation indicating a hard-surfaced, enclosed space such as a warehouse, garage, or industrial corridor. As the metallic sounds fade, a male voice shouts “Don’t move!” in a commanding, urgent tone, his voice reverberating through the space.
